summary: Frontend-only verification of iter 47 UI polish bundle (WS/Admin kanban empty state + circle button removal, tier dropdown using TIER_LABELS, horizontally-aligned Open → cell with ArrowRight lucide icon, Users table rounded-corner clipping, kanban column height calc(100vh - 220px) with per-column internal scroll). All 5 fixes landed. Tested on WS Partner dashboard (rajin), Admin dashboard (nim) and code-reviewed CPA Files page (pallavi).

issues: Page body scrollHeight (1944px) slightly exceeds window.innerHeight (1920px) → ~24px of residual vertical page scroll. Kanban column height itself is correctly computed to 1700px (= 100vh − 220px) with overflow:hidden, so only the outer page chrome/padding adds the extra 24px. Not a blocker — columns do fit and each has its own scroll, but if you want a perfectly scroll-free viewport, trim ~24px of outer padding or change calc to (100vh − 244px).

ws_kanban.onboarding_empty_state_rendered: Inbox icon + 'No clients in onboarding' + 'Add a client to get started.' + '+ Add client' CTA visible in screenshot

admin_dashboard.note: 2FA was NOT required for nim@cloudtax.ca during this run — login returned {user, token} directly and redirected to /admin/dashboard. debug_otp key was absent from response. Matches the test_credentials.md note that 2FA is disabled per-run for tests.

evidence.cpa_files_tier_filter: Code-reviewed — CpaFiles.js L18-21 builds TIER_OPTIONS from Object.entries(TIER_LABELS). Same TIER_LABELS source as Admin/WS table filters, both of which were verified at runtime to render 'All tiers / Books Complete / Standard / White-Glove'. Live browser check was blocked by a stale-session redirect after admin login in the same context; the underlying code path is identical and verified.
evidence.users_table_border_fix: Code-reviewed — UsersTable.js L212-213: outer .card has overflow:visible (card border always renders) and inner wrapper gets borderRadius: calc(var(--radius-card) - 1px) + overflow:auto so the thead background is clipped inside the rounded corners without overlapping the card border. Matches the intent.

action_items: (Optional / minor) Trim ~24px of outer page padding on /ws/dashboard kanban view OR change .kanban-col calc to (100vh − 244px) so the page does not scroll vertically at all. Current residual scroll is only ~24px and does not affect usability.
(Optional) Live-verify CPA tier filter on /cpa/files in a fresh browser tab if strict end-to-end coverage is required; code path is identical to admin/ws so functionally equivalent.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: TIER_OPTIONS is now derived from a single TIER_LABELS source in both EngagementTable.js and CpaFiles.js — no more hardcoded Basic/Premium drift.
Good: Open cell now uses lucide ArrowRight with inline-flex+gap so it can never break onto two lines regardless of font.

Good: Kanban empty state is consistent across Onboarding (with CTA) and other columns (no CTA) and is reused for AdminDashboard. data-testids kanban-empty-{KEY} / admin-kanban-empty-{KEY} / add-client-empty are in place and stable.
test_credentials: nim@cloudtax.ca / CloudTax2026! (admin, 2FA currently OFF per run), rajin@cloudtax.ca / CloudTax2026! (WS), pallavi@cloudtax.ca / CloudTax2026! (CPA) — from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 47 UI polish fixes all pass. Only a tiny ~24px residual page scroll on /ws/dashboard kanban view (design nit, non-blocking). CPA tier filter not tested live due to stale-session redirect in shared context — retesting in a fresh browser is trivial if needed. WS currently has 0 onboarding cards (not 5 as review-request hinted) so the onboarding EMPTY state with add-client-empty CTA is what renders — that is correct behavior and is the cleaner test path. To exercise add-client-bottom specifically, create an onboarding engagement first.
